title: Stavan
desc: Enjoy a collection of popular religious songs and hymns by renowned artists, played continuously. Experience divine music and spiritual enrichment.

title: Pujya Pankaj Bhai
desc: Pujya Pankajbhai founded Param Sukh Jivan Vikas Kendra with the goal of achieving total freedom. Science of divine living workshops, for all round success and happiness in day to day life.

title: Pujya Lalitprabh Ji & Chandrabh Ji M.S
desc: Pujya Lalit Prabh Ji and Pujya Chandra Prabh Ji share some spiritual thoughts and ideologies based on the scriptures to help followers lead better lives.

title: Pujya Shree Premachary Ji (Pappaji
desc: Pujya Shree Premacharyji Pappaji offers an insightful discourse on scriptures, sharing profound teachings with devotees. Join us for spiritual wisdom and guidance.

title: Pujya Sudhaben
desc: Pujya Sudhaben is a spiritual leader who gives discourses on the philosophy of Jainism and explains the teachings of great saints in detail.

title: Stavan
desc: Enjoy a collection of popular religious songs and hymns by renowned artists, played continuously. Experience divine music and spiritual enrichment.

title: Tarun Sagar Ji
desc: Pujya Tarun Sagar Ji, an Indian Digambara saint, left a lasting legacy with his teachings, compiled in the book series 'Kadve Pravachan,' offering ongoing guidance.

title: Parswanath Chalisa
desc: Parshwanath Chalisa is a collection of devotional hymns celebrating Lord Parshwanath in Jainism. It's a heartfelt tribute that expresses devotion and admiration for this revered figure.

title: Ratnakar Pachisi
desc: Ratnakar Pachisi is an epic poem which is recited in many Jain temples. It was written by Jain monk Guru Ratnakarsuri Maharaj Saheb.

title: Bhajan
desc: Experience pure joy with heartfelt bhajans that uplift your spirit and calm your soul. Let the enchanting melodies take you on a journey of divine bliss and tranquility.

title: Pujya Praman Sagar Ji
desc: Pujya Praman Sagarji a saint is a disciple of Acharya Vidyasagar. He got Vairagya on 4 March 1984 and was initiated as a Digambara saint by Acharya Vidyasagar on 31 March 1988 in Sonagiri.

title: Pujya Gyanmati Mata Ji
desc: Pujya Gyanmati Mata Ji has dedicated herself to restoring forgotten Tirthankar Bhagwants' birthplaces, promoting the ancientness of Jain Religion, worldwide.

title: Tarun Sagar Ji

title: Manglik
desc: 'Manglik' is a meaningful prayer in Jainism, celebrating auspiciousness. It reflects the positive beliefs and traditions of the Jain community, promoting harmony and spiritual well-being.

title: Uvashagram
desc: Jainism's core, Paryushan Parv, beckons believers to delve into self-reflection, penance, and purification. It's a sacred festival inviting a spiritual quest for growth and enlightenment.

title: Jain Aarti
desc: Jain Aarti, descended from the concept of fire rituals, or homa, is a Jain ritual in which light from wicks soaked in ghee purified butter or camphor is offered to one or more deities.

title: Navkar Mantra
desc: The Navkar Mantra is super important in Jainism. It's the go-to prayer for Jains when they meditate, setting the tone for their spiritual practice.

title: Jain Aarti Digamber
desc: Jain Aarti Digamber, descended from the concept of fire rituals, or homa, is a Jain ritual in which light from wicks soaked in ghee purified butter or camphor is offered to one or more deities.

desc: Parshwanath Chalisa is a collection of devotional hymns celebrating Lord Parshwanath in Jainism. It's a heartfelt tribute that expresses devotion and admiration for this revered figure.

title: Ratnakar Pachisi
desc: Ratnakar Pachisi is an epic poem which is recited in many Jain temples. It was written by Jain monk Guru Ratnakarsuri Maharaj Saheb.

desc: Dr. Hukumchand Bharill shares wisdom through reciting Samaysaar Pravachan - a talk on timeless truth and spiritual insights. Dive into enlightenment with his teachings.
